title: Generative AI Learning Map
description: A small concept map that links learners into topic-focused Reveal.js decks.

topics.title: Generative AI Overview
topics.description: Start here for the big picture: what generative AI is, why it matters, and how the rest of the topics fit together.

topics.title: Large Language Models
topics.description: The foundation model layer behind most modern chat, writing, coding, and reasoning experiences.

topics.title: Prompting & Instructions
topics.description: How humans shape model behavior with task framing, examples, constraints, and iteration.

topics.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
topics.description: A pattern for grounding model responses in selected source material rather than relying only on model memory.

topics.title: AI Agents
topics.description: Systems that use models to plan, call tools, inspect results, and continue toward a goal.

topics.title: Tool Calling
topics.description: The mechanism that lets a model ask software to perform actions or retrieve precise external information.

topics.title: Model Context Protocol
topics.description: A standard way to expose tools, resources, and prompts from external systems to AI clients.

topics.title: Evaluation & Governance
topics.description: How teams check whether AI systems are useful, safe, reliable, and improving over time.
